meaning: n.妨碍,阻碍,障碍物,(言语)障碍,口吃,障碍物
examples: John's slight speech impediment made it difficult for his mother to understand him.
The level of inflation is a serious impediment to economic recovery.
He was satisfied that there was no legal impediment to the marriage.
The old curriculum was not just an impediment, it was actually driving people away.
Tax competition almost certainly is the biggest impediment that now exists to restrain big government.
